steps.title: Center the unique contribution
steps.content: Carter is only background for the field. The main point is Feldman and Stark's unique contribution: they reconstructed early fiscal records and used that evidence to explain Philip II's defaults as short-term cash shortages.

steps.title: Reject narrower claims
steps.content: A overfocuses on Carter instead of the whole main idea. B invents a cause involving the logistics of ruling Spain and Northern Catalonia. D says the work builds on Carter's findings, which the text does not state. The answer is C.
